channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Meta releases Muse Spark 1.1 AI model, accelerating push under Alexandr Wang
item.description: Meta claims Muse Spark 1.1 outperforms OpenAI and Anthropic models on some benchmarks, but did not include comparisons to the latest versions from those labs.

item.title: Microsoft's emissions rose 25% in 2025 amid data center expansion
item.description: The company had pledged six years ago to remove more carbon than it emits by 2030.

item.title: Amazon CTO discusses how developers can leverage AI-powered coding
item.description: Software engineering is experiencing its most significant transformation in years.

item.title: Trump praises Gwynne Shotwell as SpaceX No. 2 gives $325 million in stock to Trump Accounts
item.description: The SpaceX stock gift joins the Dells' $6.25 billion contribution to children's investment accounts, while Elon Musk has not confirmed his own.
